aws.name: AWS Config enabled in all regions
aws.expected: Configuration recorder enabled and recording all resource types
aws.remediation: Enable AWS Config in all regions with all resource type recording.

aws.name: Systems Manager Inventory enabled
aws.expected: SSM Agent installed on all managed instances with inventory collection
aws.remediation: Install SSM Agent and enable inventory collection on all managed instances.

aws.name: AMI baseline documented and maintained
aws.expected: Hardened AMI baselines exist for each instance type
aws.remediation: Create and maintain hardened AMI baselines using EC2 Image Builder.

azure.name: Azure Resource Graph inventory available
azure.expected: Resource Graph queries return complete inventory of all resources
azure.remediation: Ensure all subscriptions are accessible via Azure Resource Graph.

azure.name: Azure Policy Guest Configuration enabled
azure.expected: Guest Configuration policies assigned for baseline compliance
azure.remediation: Enable Azure Policy Guest Configuration for VM baseline assessment.

gcp.name: Cloud Asset Inventory enabled
gcp.expected: Cloud Asset Inventory accessible with complete resource listing
gcp.remediation: Enable Cloud Asset API and configure asset exports.

gcp.name: OS Config inventory management enabled
gcp.expected: OS inventory management enabled on all GCE instances
gcp.remediation: Enable OS Config agent and inventory reporting on all instances.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the baseline configuration includes hardware, software, firmware, and documentation.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: the baseline configuration includes hardware, software, firmware, and documentation.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the system inventory includes hardware, software, firmware, and documentation.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: the system inventory includes hardware, software, firmware, and documentation.

aws.name: AWS Config rules for CIS Benchmark
aws.expected: Config rules aligned with CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark deployed
aws.remediation: Deploy AWS Config conformance pack for CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark.

aws.name: Security Hub CIS standard enabled
aws.expected: CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark standard enabled in Security Hub
aws.remediation: Enable CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark standard in Security Hub.

azure.name: Azure Policy assignments for security baseline
azure.expected: Azure Security Benchmark policy initiative assigned at subscription level
azure.remediation: Assign the Azure Security Benchmark policy initiative at subscription level.

azure.name: Defender for Cloud secure score reviewed
azure.expected: Secure score is above 70% for all subscriptions
azure.remediation: Address Defender for Cloud recommendations to improve secure score.

gcp.name: Organization policies configured
gcp.remediation: Configure organization policies for security baseline enforcement.

gcp.name: SCC findings for CIS compliance
gcp.expected: Security Health Analytics findings reviewed and addressed
gcp.remediation: Review and remediate Security Health Analytics findings.

aws.name: AWS Config configuration history enabled
aws.expected: Configuration history delivered to S3 bucket
aws.remediation: Configure AWS Config delivery channel to S3 for configuration history.

aws.name: CloudTrail captures config changes
aws.expected: CloudTrail captures management events including configuration changes
aws.remediation: Ensure CloudTrail records all management events for change tracking.

azure.name: Activity Log captures resource changes
azure.expected: Activity Log captures Write and Delete operations on all resources
azure.remediation: Verify Activity Log is capturing all resource modification events.

gcp.name: Admin Activity logs capture changes
gcp.expected: Admin Activity audit logs capture all configuration changes
gcp.remediation: Admin Activity logs are always enabled; verify log exports are configured.

CM-3(4).manual_guidance: Review change management process documentation. Verify that security impact analysis is performed as part of the change approval process before implementation. Check for documented risk assessment of changes to CUI systems.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the security impact of changes to each organizational system is analyzed prior to implementation.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: the security impact of changes to each organizational system is analyzed prior to implementation.

aws.name: CI/CD pipeline has approval gates
aws.expected: Production deployment pipelines include manual approval stages
aws.remediation: Add manual approval actions to production deployment pipelines.

aws.name: IAM roles for deployment are scoped
aws.expected: Deployment roles have specific permissions, not administrative access
aws.remediation: Scope deployment IAM roles to specific services and resources.

azure.name: Resource locks on critical resources
azure.expected: Delete locks applied to critical CUI resources
azure.remediation: Apply Delete or ReadOnly locks on critical resources processing CUI.

gcp.name: Project lien configured for critical projects
gcp.expected: Liens prevent accidental deletion of critical projects
gcp.remediation: Apply project liens to prevent accidental deletion of CUI projects.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: physical access restrictions associated with changes to the system are documented.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide physical security evidence: physical access restrictions associated with changes to the system are documented.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: logical access restrictions associated with changes to the system are documented.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: logical access restrictions associated with changes to the system are documented.

aws.name: Unused security groups identified
aws.expected: No security groups with no associated network interfaces (except default)
aws.remediation: Remove unused security groups to reduce attack surface.

aws.name: Unused IAM roles identified
aws.expected: No IAM roles unused for more than 90 days
aws.remediation: Remove or deactivate IAM roles not used in the last 90 days.

azure.name: Unused resources identified
azure.expected: No cost/security advisor recommendations for unused resources
azure.remediation: Review and remove unused resources identified by Azure Advisor.

gcp.name: Unused firewall rules identified
gcp.expected: No firewall rules with zero hit counts over 90 days
gcp.remediation: Remove unused firewall rules identified by firewall insights.

aws.name: Security groups restrict unnecessary ports
aws.expected: No security groups allow unrestricted access on non-essential ports
aws.remediation: Restrict security group rules to only necessary ports and protocols.

aws.name: Unnecessary AWS services restricted via SCP
aws.expected: SCPs restrict access to only approved AWS services
aws.remediation: Create SCPs to deny access to unnecessary AWS services.

azure.name: NSG rules restrict unnecessary ports
azure.expected: No NSG rules allow unrestricted access on non-essential ports
azure.remediation: Restrict NSG rules to only necessary ports and protocols.

gcp.name: Firewall rules restrict unnecessary ports
gcp.expected: No firewall rules allow unrestricted access on non-essential ports
gcp.remediation: Restrict firewall rules to only necessary ports and protocols.

aws.name: SSM AppManager or application control configured
aws.expected: Application whitelisting solution deployed on managed instances
aws.remediation: Deploy application whitelisting using SSM or third-party solution.

azure.name: Adaptive application controls enabled
azure.expected: Adaptive application controls configured for VMs processing CUI
azure.remediation: Enable Defender for Cloud adaptive application controls.

gcp.name: Binary Authorization enabled
gcp.expected: Binary Authorization policy enforced for container deployments
gcp.remediation: Enable Binary Authorization for GKE and Cloud Run deployments.

aws.name: SSM software inventory collected
aws.expected: Software inventory collected from all managed instances
aws.remediation: Configure SSM Inventory to collect software inventory from all instances.

azure.name: Change Tracking and Inventory enabled
azure.expected: Change Tracking solution enabled for all VMs
azure.remediation: Enable Change Tracking and Inventory solution for all VMs.

gcp.name: OS Config patch and inventory management
gcp.expected: OS Config agent reporting software inventory on all instances
gcp.remediation: Enable OS Config agent for software inventory management.
